title: SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of services for children with special needs and the school districts serving them, including IEP support and transition services. 11611 NE Ainsworth Circle Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Children with special needs Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 257-1679 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 257-1679 Special Education Services Annette Simms Main phone (503) 257-1590 Functional Living Skills Coordinator Melanie Hart INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Disability Related Parenting Programs Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - ALTERNATIVE PATHWAYS/TRIO EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - OUTDOOR SCHOOL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
